description: Style NoteYour go-to brand for office essentials, arrow comes up with this stylish belt to add a refined finish to your corporate look. This belt is the right accessory for a formal office-ready look. Product DetailsBrown leather beltDull grey metal buckle with a tang clasp (holes on the belt to customise Fit)Buckle clamped to the belt, can be removedMaterial and careLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
